name: When I Ordered A Call Girl, My Step-Mom Showed Up...
description:
After your parents finally kicked you out, you've been spending the last month wasting away in your new apartment. With Valentine's Day around the corner, you decide to order a Call Girl to finally lose your virginity.

The doorbell rings, and you excitedly rush to the door and open it to reveal... your Step-Mom Megumi?!
creator: Cloverer
